fields.description:
## Why
Two coaching situations rebar cannot express well. DEFERRED_MEASUREMENT was REJECTED as a move (counter-architectural).

## What (verified locations + decisions made)
- CORRECTION: the MOVE_REGISTRY INSTANCE is in src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py:686 (coach.py holds only MOVE_REGISTRY_SCHEMA, the validator; orchestrator.py:87 re-exports from passes). Edit passes.py:686. load_move_registry (passes.py:736) merges project extensions. Consumers to keep green: orchestrator re-export + tests/unit/test_plan_review.py (dereferences the registry).
- Also mirrored verbatim in docs/plan-review-gate.md (lines ~148-160) -- update in lockstep.
- Add foundation/enhancement move with a LOCKED template (LLM fills only {subject}): "Ship a working baseline of {subject} now; make the enhanced version a dependent follow-on." Decision: it CARRIES an applies_when field scoping it to sizing/coverage findings (matching how existing moves are offered); the applies_when vocabulary is the existing move-gating tag set in load_move_registry.
- Sharpen move 9 IN-PLACE (decision: in-place, not a new move) from "Plan how {subject} will be verified before implementing it." to also cover restating an unobservable/deferred success target as an in-session-observable one. Back-out = revert the template string.
- F1 phrasing note (folded into AC): F1 as a whole is the blocking criterion (block_threshold 0.7); in_session_evaluable is its checklist item -- do not imply the sub-item independently blocks.
- DO NOT add DEFERRED_MEASUREMENT: post-hoc validation -> a discovered_from follow-up ticket.

## Provenance
Gap-report labels (G-*/FP-*/R-*/WS-N) are tags from ~/dso_rebar_plan_review_gap_report.md + session log brief-bride-rash (95f1-1b3b-a867-4020), NOT codebase symbols. Symbols introduced by a SIBLING story (e.g. committed_work_relies_on_unbacked_claim from WS1) are target-state, not pre-existing; the dependency is recorded.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] foundation/enhancement move added to MOVE_REGISTRY in passes.py:686 with its verbatim locked template + an applies_when scoping. Proof: `pytest tests/unit/test_plan_review.py -k move_registry` green (existing MOVE_REGISTRY rendering test).
- [ ] move 9 template updated in-place; docs/plan-review-gate.md move table updated identically. Proof: doc table matches passes.py MOVE_REGISTRY (diff check).
- [ ] All MOVE_REGISTRY consumers still pass (orchestrator re-export + test_plan_review.py). Proof: `pytest tests/unit/test_plan_review.py` green.
- [ ] Coaching for post-hoc validation routes to a discovered_from follow-up ticket, never deferring the current AC. Proof: a coach-mapping test asserting the follow-up-ticket move id is selected, not a defer.
